full_text:
A) Dissociation

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase and Collagenase & Hyaluronidase by Foteini.

Dispase dissociation media included 9.700 mL DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µL Dispase + 100 µL DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 8.9 mL DMEM/F12+++, 1 mL Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) First RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. Second RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++.The final pellet was resuspended in 4 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) First RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 4 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 10.48 E6 cells/vial for a total of 5 vials

Sequentially dissociated cells: 10.46 E6 cells/vial for a total of 9 vials

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 13.4 | 21.0
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 9.92 | 17.4
 | viability [%] | 74% | 82.7
 | size [µm] | 8.9 | 7.6
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 12.8 | 26.1
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 9.89 | 22.9
 | viability [%] | 77.3 | 87.6
 | size [µm] | 8.9 | 8.4
Average | total [E6 cells/ml] | 13.1 | 23.55
total | total [E6 cells] | 52.4 in 4 mL | 94.2 in 4 mL
Average | live [E6 cells/ml] | 9.9 | 20.15
total | live [E6 cells] | 39.62 in 4 mL | 80.6 in 4 mL
 | viability [%] | 75.65 | 85.15
